Actions.Text: COMMITTEE DISCHARGED AND COMMITTED TO RULES
ORDERED TO THIRD READING RULES CAL.1415

Title: Relates to caregiver requirements for certain day care homes
Summary: Requires one caregiver for every two children under eighteen months of age in group family day care homes and family day care homes.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the social services law, in relation to caregiver requirements for certain day care homes
